biological_replicate: the metabolic responses of C. glabrata under acetate growth condition
technical_replicate: three technical replicates for each of the two biological replicates
experimental_design: differential gene expression between acetate-grown C. glabrata and glucose-grown C. glabrata (control)
factor_value: acetate-grown C. glabrata and glucose-grown C. glabrata
number_of_technical_replicates: three technical replicates for each of the two biological replicates
number_of_biological_replicates: two biological replicates of the growth conditions
